project_type: Android Kotlin app with Jetpack Compose, Room, DataStore, manual DI
build_system: Gradle (Kotlin DSL) with version catalog (libs.versions.toml). Uses KSP for Room annotation processing.
test_framework: No unit tests present in codebase. AndroidJUnitRunner configured for instrumentation tests but none exist.
test_command: No tests to run - project has no test files
verification_instructions: Run ./gradlew assembleDebug to verify the project compiles. No unit/instrumentation tests exist to run.
setup_instructions: Project uses Gradle wrapper. Run ./gradlew assembleDebug from the project root.
environment_constraints: Android project - requires Android SDK 35. No emulator/device available for runtime testing. Validation is compile-only via assembleDebug.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md. Key constraint from user: DO NOT modify ReplyGuard.kt, DO NOT change conversationKey generation, DO NOT change dedup logic.
key_patterns: Manual DI via AppContainer. Room entities have toDomain()/toEntity() extension functions. ViewModels created via AppViewModelFactory. Compose UI with AlertDialog for editors. FilterChip for enum selections. Database migrations are explicit Migration objects added to Room builder. Notification listener caches settings/rules in volatile fields updated via Flow.
directory_structure: app/src/main/java/com/autoreply/bot/ - domain/ (models + ReplyEngine), data/local/ (Room entities + DAOs + AppDatabase), data/repository/ (repositories), data/settings/ (DataStore), service/ (NotificationListener + ReplyGuard), ui/ (Compose screens + ViewModels), di/ (AppContainer), apps/ (app list for filtering)
